question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from patient samples?
explain: The paper mentions that HIV-1 sequences were obtained from patient samples. Specifically, it states that viral RNA was determined in 160 baseline plasma samples and that these samples were amplified and sequenced for HIV-1 subtyping and genotypic drug resistance analysis.
sentences: Viral RNA was determined in 160 baseline plasma samples; One hundred and sixty samples (73 males and 87 females) were amplified and sequenced for HIV-1 subtyping and genotypic drug resistance analysis.

question: Does the paper report in vitro drug susceptibility data?
explain: The paper focuses on genotypic drug resistance and molecular characterization of HIV-1 from patient samples. It does not mention any in vitro drug susceptibility assays or data.
sentences: The entire PR and the first 335 codons (76%) of the RT regions of the pol gene of the HIV-1 genome (N = 160) were amplified and sequenced using an in-house assay; Genotypic drug resistance was defined as the presence of one or more resistance-related mutations as specified by the consensus mutation of Stanford University HIVDB and the International Antiviral Society (IAS) mutation lists.

question: Does the paper report GenBank accession numbers for sequenced HIV isolates? If "Yes", what were the GenBank accession numbers for sequenced HIV isolates?
explain: The paper explicitly states that nucleotide sequences are deposited in the National Centre for Biotechnology Information (NCBI), USA GenBank, and provides the accession numbers.
sentences: Nucleotide sequences are deposited in National Centre for Biotechnology Information (NCBI), USA GenBank (Accession Number: KF026059-KF026220).

question: Which HIV species were studied in the paper?
explain: The paper consistently refers to HIV-1 throughout its content, including the title, abstract, and methods sections.
sentences: This study was aimed to determine the molecular characterization and pre-antiretroviral treatment resistance mutations among HIV-1 chronically infected ART naïve patients after the roll out of ART in Ethiopia; The entire PR and the first 335 codons (76%) of the RT regions of the pol gene of the HIV-1 genome (N = 160) were amplified and sequenced using an in-house assay.

question: Which HIV genes were reported to have been sequenced?
answer: A. Protease, PR; B. Reverse transcriptase, RT
explain: The methods section of the paper specifies that the entire PR and the first 335 codons (76%) of the RT regions of the pol gene were amplified and sequenced.
sentences: The entire PR and the first 335 codons (76%) of the RT regions of the pol gene of the HIV-1 genome (N = 160) were amplified and sequenced using an in-house assay.

question: From which countries were the sequenced samples obtained?
explain: The paper mentions that the study was conducted in Ethiopia and that patients were recruited from Gondar University Hospital in Northwest Ethiopia.
sentences: This study was aimed to determine the molecular characterization and pre-antiretroviral treatment resistance mutations among HIV-1 chronically infected ART naïve patients after the roll out of ART in Ethiopia; HIV-1 chronically infected treatment naïve patients (N = 160) with advanced diseases (WHO clinical stages III and IV) above 18 years of age and seeking care and treatment at Gondar University Hospital for the first time, Northwest Ethiopia in 2008/2009 were recruited consecutively.

question: From what years were the sequenced samples obtained?
explain: The methods section specifies that patients were recruited in 2008/2009.
sentences: HIV-1 chronically infected treatment naïve patients (N = 160) with advanced diseases (WHO clinical stages III and IV) above 18 years of age and seeking care and treatment at Gondar University Hospital for the first time, Northwest Ethiopia in 2008/2009 were recruited consecutively.

question: What method was used for sequencing?
explain: The methods section describes the use of the Big Dye Terminator Cycle Sequencing Ready Reaction kit, which is a Sanger sequencing method.
sentences: Purified PCR products were subjected to direct sequencing of both sense and antisense strands using Big Dye Terminator Cycle Sequencing Ready Reaction kit (Applied Biosystems, Foster City, CA, USA).

question: Were samples cloned prior to sequencing?
explain: The methods section does not mention any cloning steps prior to sequencing. It describes direct sequencing of PCR products.
sentences: Purified PCR products were subjected to direct sequencing of both sense and antisense strands using Big Dye Terminator Cycle Sequencing Ready Reaction kit (Applied Biosystems, Foster City, CA, USA).
